al-camp-comer: Sprawling 1,000-acre Scouts BSA resident summer camp set atop Lookout Mountain near Mentone, Alabama.
al-camp-jackson: 515-acre Greater Alabama Council camp along the Tennessee River near Scottsboro, offering a traditional Scouts BSA resident summer program. Features waterfalls, more than 10 miles of trails, fishing, canoeing, mountain boards, and swimming.
al-camp-sequoyah: 1,447-acre resident Scouts BSA summer camp near Mt. Cheaha.
al-camp-westmoreland-cub-scout-twilight-: Cub Scout twilight day camp at the historic Camp Westmoreland in Florence, Alabama, offering BB guns, archery, STEM, field sports, and nature activities.
al-camp-alaflo-heersink-scout-reservatio: A 520-acre summer camp near Enterprise, Alabama, serving Scouts BSA and Cub Scouts. Features an air-conditioned dining hall, Lake Essayon with a floating dock for canoeing, and archery, shotgun, and rifle ranges. Offers the Pathfinders first-year camper program, merit badges, and a high-adventure activity.
al-maubila-scout-reservation-maubila-sum: Mobile Area Council's Scouts BSA summer camp in Grove Hill, Alabama, operating the multi-day Maubila Summer Express program with merit badges, waterfront activities, and shooting sports.
al-camp-dexter-c-hobbs-cub-scout-adventu: Cub Scout resident (overnight) adventure camp at Camp Dexter Hobbs within Warner Scout Reservation, operated by the Tukabatchee Area Council in Prattville, Alabama.
al-camp-tukabatchee: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at Warner Scout Reservation, offering merit badges, COPE, aquatics, shooting sports, and ATV.
al-camp-tukabatchee-webelos-aol-resident: Webelos and Arrow of Light resident summer camp at Warner Scout Reservation, operated by the Tukabatchee Area Council.
al-camp-horne: Black Warrior Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 488 acres in Cottondale, Alabama, featuring a pool, two lakes, a shooting sports complex, a climbing tower, and merit badge programs.
az-camp-geronimo: Scouts BSA week-long resident summer camp operated by the Grand Canyon Council, set below the Mogollon Rim north of Payson, Arizona.
az-heard-scout-pueblo: Grand Canyon Council 500-acre camp at the base of South Mountain in Phoenix, hosting Cub Scout day camp for youth in grades K–5, with shooting sports.
az-r-c-scout-ranch: Grand Canyon Council's Raymond-Cragin (R-C) Scout Reservation, hosting a Cub Scout resident camp near Parks and Flagstaff, Arizona.
az-camp-lawton: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Catalina Council, set in the Santa Catalina Mountains near Tucson, Arizona.
ar-camp-de-soto: WildQuest resident summer camp for Scouts BSA, located in El Dorado, Arkansas.
ar-camp-orr: Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Jasper, Arkansas, offering merit-badge programs along with high-adventure treks.
ar-camp-rockefeller: Scouts BSA resident summer camp located on the Gus Blass Scout Reservation.
ca-camp-herms: Cub and Webelos camp set in the hills of El Cerrito, offering weekend Cub Scout events and a space-themed Adventure Camp for Webelos and Arrow of Light Scouts designed to prepare them for Scouts BSA summer camp.
ca-cabrillo-beach-youth-waterfront-sport: Beachfront aquatics and camping center on Cabrillo Beach in San Pedro, operated by the Greater Los Angeles Area Council, offering Cub Scout and Scout day camps with swimming, kayaking, canoeing, archery, and merit badge programs.
ca-camp-trask-cub-twilight-camp: Cub Scout twilight day camp at the Greater Los Angeles Area Council's Trask Scout Reservation in Monrovia Canyon Park, offering advancement-focused activities including BB and target sports, archery, a swimming pool, a historic fort, and campfire programs.
ca-camp-marin-sierra: Marin Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp located at Emigrant Gap within the Tahoe National Forest.
ca-marin-council-cub-scout-day-camp-camp: Cub Scout day camp at Camp Tamarancho in Fairfax, California, for youth entering grades 2–5, offering archery, BB gun shooting, field sports, handicraft, nature study, and waterfront activities.
ca-irvine-ranch-outdoor-education-center: A 210-acre Orange County Council outdoor education center offering day-camp programs including Paddle Sport Aquatics, Junior Aquatics, and Adventure Hill featuring a zip line, high and low ropes, and a climbing tower.
ca-newport-sea-base: Orange County Council's aquatics high-adventure base on Newport Harbor, offering sailing, rowing, kayaking, fishing, oceanography, and STEM programs for youth.
ca-schoepe-scout-reservation-at-lost-val: Orange County Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Warner Springs, California.
ca-camp-noyo: Small Scouts BSA resident camp on the Noyo River between Fort Bragg and Willits, accessed via the Skunk Train, hosting roughly 100 campers. Offers summer resident sessions and a Redwoods to Waves adventure trek for older Scouts and Venturers.
ca-camp-emerson-boseker-scout-reservatio: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Boseker Scout Reservation in the San Jacinto Mountains near Idyllwild, California. Offers merit badge programs in aquatics, shooting sports, and climbing tower, plus Trail to First Class. Also home to Camp Brown and Camp Wiley.
ca-camp-robert-l-cole: High-elevation (7,200 ft) wilderness camp on Lake Sterling in the Tahoe National Forest, reservable by units for First Class advancement, intensive merit badge programs, fishing, and stargazing.
ca-camp-balboa: Urban Cub Scout day camp in San Diego's Balboa Park, adjacent to the council service center, offering family and weekend camping with a full-size swimming pool and ten campsites.
ca-camp-fiesta-island: Waterfront Scouts BSA resident camp on Fiesta Island in Mission Bay, operated by the San Diego-Imperial Council.
ca-mataguay-scout-ranch: Mountain Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by San Diego-Imperial Council, located near Lake Henshaw in Santa Ysabel, California.
ca-webelos-and-aol-resident-camp: Cub Scout resident camp for Webelos and Arrow of Light on Mission Bay in San Diego, operated by the San Diego-Imperial Council.
ca-camp-emerald-bay: Western LA County Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Catalina Island.
ca-camp-whitsett: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Western Los Angeles County Council, set in the Sequoia National Forest near Kernville, California.
ca-ventura-county-cub-scout-day-camp: Daytime Cub Scout program in Moorpark, California for grades 1–5, offering archery, BB guns, a climbing wall, outdoor skills, crafts, and advancement.
ca-camp-verdugo-oaks: Cub Scout day camp in the Verdugo Hills area of California, off I-5 near Templin Highway north of Glendale, offering a swimming pool, archery and BB ranges, and a nature trail.
ca-camp-john-mensinger: Greater Yosemite Council Scouts BSA summer resident camp in the Stanislaus National Forest at roughly 4,800 feet near Beardsley Reservoir. Offers a "Woodsman" program for first- and second-year Scouts, aquatics using a pool, camp lake, and reservoir, plus Webelos Adventure @ Mensinger.
ca-camp-mcconnell: Greater Yosemite Council camp on the Merced River near Livingston, hosting Cub Scout resident and day camp, Camp Akela, and Webelos activities, along with troop weekend camping and leader training.
co-camp-alexander: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by Pathway to the Rockies Council, set within Colorado's Pike National Forest near Lake George.
co-camp-alexander-outback: High-adventure trek program based at Camp Alexander in the Colorado Rockies.
co-rocky-mountain-high-adventure-base: High-adventure base at San Isabel Scout Ranch in Colorado's Wet Mountains, offering whitewater rafting, climbing and rappelling, mountain biking, and peak summits.
co-camp-cortlandt-dietler: Scouts BSA patrol-method resident summer camp at Peaceful Valley (McNeil) Scout Ranch, Denver Area Council, in Elbert, Colorado, emphasizing patrol cooking and high-adventure outposts alongside merit badge programs.
co-camp-cris-dobbins: Scouts BSA resident summer camp within McNeil Scout Ranch at Peaceful Valley in Colorado, offering 50+ merit badges, an outdoor pool with water slides, and an Olympic shotgun range.
co-cub-scout-adventure-camp-at-camp-cris: Cub Scout resident overnight camp at Camp Cris Dobbins, McNeil Scout Ranch at Peaceful Valley in Elbert, Colorado. Age-specific programming includes sports, handicrafts, nature, swimming, and boating. Each Cub attends accompanied by a parent or guardian.
co-magness-adventure-camp: Denver Area Council's Cub Scout resident camp at Peaceful Valley (McNeil) Scout Ranch in Elbert, Colorado, offering lake activities plus BB gun and archery ranges.
co-tahosa-high-adventure-base: High-adventure base of the Greater Colorado Council at 9,000 feet near Ward, Colorado, offering backpacking through Tahosa Trek, Alpine Adventure, Mountain Men provisional camping, EaglePoint, and NYLT.
co-elkhorn-high-adventure-base: Backpacking high-adventure base at Ben Delatour Scout Ranch in Colorado's Roosevelt National Forest and Rawah Wilderness, offering rock climbing, rappelling, and black-powder shooting.
co-jack-nicol-cub-scout-camp: Cub Scout resident camp (Cub World) at Ben Delatour Scout Ranch for Lions through Webelos and AOL, featuring medieval castle, frontier fort, and STEM themes.
wy-camp-laramie-peak: Scouts BSA resident camp of the Adventure West Council with family-style dining hall, set at the base of Black Mountain near Wheatland beside Medicine Bow National Forest. Offerings range from the Roaring Lion first-year program to high-adventure rock climbing, mountain boarding, and ATVs.
ct-camp-workcoeman-cub-scout-day-camp: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Connecticut Rivers Council in New Hartford, Connecticut.
ct-camp-workcoeman-cub-scout-resident-ca: Cub Scout overnight resident camp operated by the Connecticut Rivers Council on West Hill Pond in New Hartford, Connecticut.
ct-camp-seton-ernest-thompson-seton-scou: Cub Scout day camp on the 238-acre Ernest Thompson Seton Scout Reservation in Greenwich, open to Scouts and non-Scouts, with shooting sports, a swimming pool, climbing tower, boating, nature, and creek exploration.
ct-edmund-d-strang-scout-reservation: Housatonic Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on 186 acres in Litchfield County, Goshen, Connecticut, focused on merit badge advancement, with a Venturing/off-site program and a Webelos resident program.
ct-camp-sequassen: Connecticut Yankee Council Scouts BSA resident camp on West Hill Lake in New Hartford, offering merit badges, waterfront activities, a climbing tower, and shooting sports.
va-camp-bowman: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at Goshen Scout Reservation, featuring patrol-cooking.
va-camp-marriott: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at Goshen Scout Reservation in Goshen, Virginia, featuring an extensive aquatics program.
va-camp-pmi: Webelos resident camp located at Goshen Scout Reservation in Goshen, Virginia.
va-camp-william-b-snyder: National Capital Area Council camp in Haymarket, Virginia, designed for Cub Scouts, offering Cub and Webelos resident programs, Cub day sessions, and Scouts BSA specialty programming.
va-lenhoksin-high-adventure: High-adventure base at Goshen Scout Reservation in Goshen, Virginia, offering backpacking and canoe treks on the James River for older Scouts.
fl-camp-la-no-che: Central Florida Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Paisley, FL, where Scouts choose merit-badge and specialty programs including shooting sports, ATVs, sailing, swimming, and climbing.
fl-camp-elmore: A 120-acre South Florida Council Cub Scout day camp in Davie, Broward County, offering themed programs featuring Scout skills, archery, BB shooting, arts and crafts, land sports, and conservation.
fl-camp-oklawaha: Gulf Stream Council wilderness camp set in an oak hammock along the Sebastian River, hosting the Indian River District Cub Scout Day Camp for Tigers through Arrow of Light.
fl-tanah-keeta-scout-reservation: Gulf Stream Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Jupiter, Florida.
fl-camp-shands: North Florida Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Hawthorne, offering aquatics, COPE, climbing, and shooting sports.
fl-st-johns-river-base-at-echockotee-aqu: Aquatics-focused day camp on Doctor's Lake in Orange Park, Florida, offering waterfront activities, a 50-foot climbing and rappelling wall, BB and archery ranges, ecology, and sports for youth.
fl-camp-miles-price-sanders-scout-reserv: Southwest Florida Council's 1,200-acre Scouts BSA resident camp near Punta Gorda, featuring a pool, rifle, shotgun, archery, and BB ranges, a climbing wall, rappelling tower, ropes course, and waterfront.
fl-camp-soule: Cub Scout day camp in Pinellas County offering crafts, nature walks, archery, and more for youth entering grades 1–5.
fl-flaming-arrow-scout-reservation: 677-acre camp set on three spring-fed lakes near Lake Wales, home to Greater Tampa Bay Area Council resident camp programs, offering a Webelos/Arrow of Light resident camp that introduces Cubs to Scouts BSA-style camping.
fl-sand-hill-scout-reservation: Sprawling 1,300-acre Scout camp of the Greater Tampa Bay Area Council near Brooksville, offering archery, rifle and shotgun sports, canoeing, rappelling, and swimming, with a first-year Scout program.
ga-camp-frank-g-lumpkin-chattahoochee-sc: NCAP-accredited Scouts BSA resident summer camp on West Point Lake, roughly 15 miles northwest of LaGrange, Georgia, offering merit badges, COPE, and aquatics.
ga-bert-adams-scout-camp: Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on 1,300 acres in Covington, Georgia, operated by the Atlanta Area Council.
ga-woodruff-scout-camp: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Atlanta Area Council, set in the north Georgia mountains near Blairsville.
ga-camp-daniel-marshall: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Georgia-Carolina Council in Lincolnton, Georgia.
ga-camp-thunder-gerald-i-lawhorn-scoutin: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at the Gerald I. Lawhorn Scouting Base near Molena, Georgia, set between the Flint River and Pine Mountain. Offers traditional merit badges, evening adventures, and optional whitewater rafting.
ga-camp-patten: Cub Scout day camp on the Alapaha River in Lakeland, Georgia, run by the South Georgia Council, offering archery, BB guns, canoeing, swimming, STEM activities, and Pinewood Derby.
ga-black-creek-scout-reservation: Coastal Georgia Council's 380-acre Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Black Creek in Screven County, featuring a private lake, 60-foot climbing tower, ropes courses, shooting ranges, and an air-conditioned dining hall. NCAP-accredited.
ga-camp-tolochee: Cub Scout twilight day camp on Blythe Island in coastal Brunswick, Georgia, offering Bobcat rank classes, shooting sports, climbing, fishing, crafts, and games in evening sessions.
ga-camp-sidney-dew: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 650 acres in northwest Georgia, operated by the Northwest Georgia Council.
ga-camp-rainey-mountain: Scouts BSA resident summer camp set in the mountains of Northeast Georgia.
ga-scoutland: Northeast Georgia Council's 140-acre Cub Scout day camp on Lake Lanier in Gainesville, Georgia.
hi-camp-alan-faye: Aloha Council's 29-acre resident camp in Kokee State Park near Waimea Canyon at 2,400 feet elevation. District-led summer camp with volunteer support where campers bring their own tents, featuring a riflery range.
hi-camp-maluhia: Aloha Council's Maui camp set on the island's windward slopes, offering a dining hall, cabins, pool, and riflery range, and hosting unit and summer camp programs.
hi-camp-pupukea: Aloha Council's flagship Scouts BSA resident camp on the North Shore of Oahu, offering long-term troop-cook summer camp for Scouts.
id-bradley-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Stanley, Idaho, offering a mountain outdoor program.
id-camp-murtaugh: Cub Scout and Webelos day camp on Murtaugh Lake southeast of Twin Falls, Idaho, operated by Mountain West Council for single-day events.
id-salmon-river-high-adventure-base: Whitewater rafting high-adventure trek along the lower Salmon River within the remote Salmon River Canyon of Idaho, operated by the Mountain West Council for crews of adults and youth.
id-cub-scout-day-camp-at-krupp-scout-hol: Grand Teton Council Cub Scout day camp at Scout Hollow near Rigby, Idaho, for Cub Scouts in grades K–5, offering archery, BB guns, crafts, and nature hikes.
il-camp-robert-drake: Scouts BSA resident summer camp situated along the Salt Fork River in central Illinois.
il-ingersoll-scout-reservation: Set on roughly 650 acres near London Mills, W. D. Boyce Council's primary Scouts BSA resident camp features a 50-foot climbing tower and zipline, Lake Roberts waterfront, shooting sports, Eco-Con, Scoutcraft, and cooking.
il-camp-eastman: Mississippi Valley Council resident camp set on the bluffs above the Mississippi River near Nauvoo, offering a swimming pool, small-boat activities, and a merit badge program for Scouts BSA and Cub Scouts.
il-saukenauk-scout-reservation: Mississippi Valley Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp on 602 acres near Mendon, Illinois, featuring a 40-acre lake, a 30-foot climbing wall, and a zipline.
il-saukenauk-scout-reservation-webelos-a: Mississippi Valley Council resident camp in Mendon, Illinois, for Webelos and Arrow of Light Scouts entering grades 4-5.
il-camp-bunn: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on over 600 acres near Hettick, featuring a private lake (Lake Freesen) with small-boat sailing, COPE/climbing, shooting sports, and merit badge programs.
il-camp-illinek: Cub Scout resident camp near Chatham operated by the Abraham Lincoln Council, offering swimming at a local pool, archery, BB shooting, crafts, and outdoor programming.
in-maumee-scout-reservation: Hoosier Trails Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning over 640 acres around 64-acre Lake Tarzian, offering merit badges, aquatics, and shooting sports.
in-camp-chief-little-turtle: Anthony Wayne Area Council's Scouts BSA and Cub Scout resident summer camp on the 1,200-acre Anthony Wayne Scout Reservation, which also includes Camps Foellinger and Wilderness, near Pleasant Lake, Indiana.
in-camp-belzer: Cub Scout day camp of the Crossroads of America Council in Indianapolis, offering obstacle courses, BB guns, archery, swimming, STEM, and crafts.
in-camp-kikthawenund: Crossroads of America Council resident Cub Scout camp spanning 230 acres along Pipe Creek near Frankton, offering a weekend pack overnight program featuring STEM, aquatics, archery, and sports.
in-camp-wildwood: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Crossroads of America Council (Wabash Valley) in Terre Haute, offering an optional Friday-night overnight step-up.
in-camp-buffalo: Sagamore Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp along the Tippecanoe River north of Monticello, offering aquatics, shooting sports, outdoor skills, skilled trades, ecology, and a Brownsea Island program.
in-franklin-l-cary-camp: Sagamore Council (Wabash Valley) Cub Scout day camp located east of Lafayette, Indiana, offering a weekday daytime program.
in-camp-topenebee: Cub Scout day camp for grades 1–5 in Michigan City, Indiana, offering archery, BBs, STEM, crafts, and athletics.
mi-camp-tamarack: La Salle Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning roughly 500 acres at Wood Lake Scout Reservation south of Jones, Michigan; nationally accredited and offering more than 40 merit badges.
ia-howard-h-cherry-scout-reservation: Hawkeye Area Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp (Camp Wakonda) near Waubeek and Central City, Iowa, offering merit badges, a COPE/climbing course, aquatics, and a pistol program.
ia-ingawanis-adventure-base: Winnebago Council's Scouts BSA resident camp near Waverly, Iowa, with direct access to the Cedar River.
ia-ingawanis-adventure-base-cub-scout-re: Winnebago Council Cub Scout resident camp in Waverly, Iowa, offering an overnight camping experience at Ingawanis Adventure Base.
ia-ingawanis-adventure-base-webelos-resi: Winnebago Council Webelos resident camp located at Ingawanis Adventure Base in Waverly, Iowa.
ia-camp-mitigwa-cub-experience-summer-ca: Cub Scout resident camp within Mitigwa Scout Reservation in Woodward, Iowa, operated by the Mid-Iowa Council.
ia-camp-mitigwa-mitigwa-scout-reservatio: Mid-Iowa Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp at Mitigwa Scout Reservation, near Woodward and Boone, Iowa.
ia-camp-c-s-klaus: Northeast Iowa Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp set in a 200-acre wooded valley near Colesburg, offering 45+ merit badges, a COPE/climbing tower, aquatics on Lake John Deere, and a BASE Camp program for new Scouts.
ia-camp-c-s-klaus-cub-scout-adventure: Cub Scout resident camp in Colesburg, Iowa, run by the Northeast Iowa Council for youth entering grades 1–5, with families camping together.
ia-camp-c-s-klaus-cub-scout-day-camp: Cub Scout day camp in Colesburg, Iowa, serving Northeast Iowa Council youth in grades 1–5, offering archery, BBs, slingshots, and a climbing tower.
ia-camp-c-s-klaus-cub-scout-overnight: Overnight resident camp experience in Colesburg, Iowa, designed as a first overnight for younger Cub Scouts.
ia-camp-c-s-klaus-webelos-and-arrow-of-l: Northeast Iowa Council resident camp in Colesburg, Iowa, for Webelos and Arrow of Light Scouts.
ks-brown-memorial-camp-camp-brown: Coronado Area Council Cub Scout resident camp in Abilene, Kansas, offering swimming, shooting sports, drones, and campfires.
ks-dane-g-hansen-scout-reservation-camp-: Coronado Area Council Scouts BSA resident camp on the south shore of Kirwin Reservoir in northwest Kansas, offering over 35 merit badges, a Trail to Eagle first-year program, shooting sports, ATV, COPE, and aquatics.
ks-falley-scout-reservation-camp-delawar: Jayhawk Area Council Cub Scout resident camp at Camp Delaware on Falley Scout Reservation, located near Lake Perry in Oskaloosa, Kansas, offering Cub Scout Resident Camp and Akela Camp.
ks-falley-scout-reservation-camp-jayhawk: Traditional Scouts BSA summer camp on the 340-plus-acre Falley Scout Reservation, offering merit badges and activities in aquatics, outdoor skills, ecology, handicraft, STEAM, shooting sports, COPE, and climbing.
ks-camp-kanza: Quivira Council's Cub Scout and Webelos resident summer camp near Abbyville, Kansas.
ks-camp-mandan-mandan-scout-camp-and-tra: Quivira Council camp on the western side of the council near Wright, Kansas, hosting a Cub Scout resident camp.
ks-quivira-scout-ranch: Scouts BSA and Venturing resident summer camp located in Sedan, Kansas.
ky-camp-mckee: Blue Grass Council's nationally accredited Scouts BSA resident camp on 800-plus acres in eastern Kentucky, offering a Pioneer first-year camper program, over 50 merit badges, shooting sports, and mountain biking.
ky-camp-mckee-high-adventure: High-adventure program for older Scouts near the Red River Gorge in Jeffersonville, Kentucky, offering rock climbing, underground canoeing, ziplining, horsemanship, and target shooting. Scouts camp with their unit and travel off-site during the day.
in-tunnel-mill-scout-reservation: Lincoln Heritage Council's Cub Scout resident camp in Charlestown, Indiana, serving Tigers through Arrow of Light with water activities, fishing, shooting sports, Scout skills, and STEM.
ky-camp-crooked-creek: Week-long Scouts BSA resident camp located at the Harry S. Frazier Jr. Scout Reservation in Shepherdsville, Kentucky.
ky-pfeffer-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp situated on Kentucky Lake.
la-camp-edgewood: Calcasieu Area Council's 283-acre camp in southern Beauregard Parish between DeQuincy and Ragley, near Lake Charles. Offers 14 campsites, archery, rifle, and shotgun ranges, and a dining hall, hosting resident summer camp, year-round unit camping, and a Cub Scout day camp.
la-camp-avondale: Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on the 1,680-acre Avondale Scout Reservation in Clinton, Louisiana.
la-louisiana-swamp-base: High-adventure and conservation program run by the Evangeline Area Council, immersing crews in paddling treks through the Atchafalaya Swamp.
la-mountain-bayou-scout-camp: Evangeline Area Council's 640-acre resident camp near Mt. Bayou Lake in Evangeline Parish, north of Ville Platte, Louisiana. Offers traditional scoutcraft, nature, and aquatics including pool swimming and lake canoe trips for Scouts BSA and Cub resident programs.
la-camp-attakapas: National-accredited resident summer camp for Scouts BSA in Trout, Louisiana.
la-camp-t-l-james: Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Downsville, Louisiana, offering a nationally accredited overnight camping program.
ms-camp-v-bar-salmen-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Perkinston, Stone County, Mississippi, operated by the Southeast Louisiana Council at Camp V-Bar within Salmen Scout Reservation, roughly 70 miles north of New Orleans.
la-kinsey-scout-reservation: Norwela Council's 1,600-acre Scouts BSA resident summer camp in northwest Louisiana, near Shreveport, offering aquatics, shooting sports, climbing at Mount Haley, outdoor skills, nature, handicraft, Trail to First Class, and Star-to-Eagle programs.
me-camp-roosevelt: Scouts BSA resident camp on the Katahdin Scout Reservation in Eddington, Maine, operated by Katahdin Area Council, offering hands-on outdoor skills, merit badge sessions, paddling, archery, and campwide activities.
me-maine-high-adventure-base: High-adventure canoe and backcountry trekking base at Grand Lake Matagamon, Maine, offering guided crew treks with staff guides through the region's wilderness.
me-camp-nutter: A 30-acre Pine Tree Council property on Loon Pond in Acton, Maine, used by the York District for weekend events and Cub Scout Day Camp.
me-camp-william-hinds: Pine Tree Council Scouts BSA resident camp on Panther Pond in Maine's Sebago region, offering more than 40 merit badges, sailing, STEM, shooting sports, and a first-year-camper program.
me-camp-william-hinds-cub-scout-overnigh: Pine Tree Council Cub Scout overnight resident camp in Raymond, Maine, welcoming Tiger-age and older Cubs, with shooting sports, swimming, boating, field sports, outdoor cooking, and rank advancement.
md-camp-catoctin: Baltimore Area Council's all-volunteer, nationally accredited Scouts BSA resident camp located in Catoctin Mountain Park within the Maryland mountains, offering merit-badge programming.
ma-greenough-scout-reservation-camp-gree: Cub Scout day camp on Cape Cod offering swimming, fishing, crafts, hiking, biking, nature study, field sports, archery, and BB.
ma-treasure-valley-scout-reservation: Heart of New England Council's weeklong Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Browning Pond in Rutland, Massachusetts, offering merit badges, high-ropes, climbing, and vocational-tech program areas.
nh-camp-wanocksett: Heart of New England Council's 223-acre Scouts BSA and Venturing resident camp in Dublin, New Hampshire, with views of Mount Monadnock, offering waterfront waterskiing, sailing, climbing, and high ropes.
ma-horace-a-moses-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 1,295 acres in the Berkshire foothills.
mn-camp-horace-johnson: Cub Scout day camp on Island Lake Reservoir in the Duluth area, offered as a week-long summer discovery program by Northern Star Scouting.
mn-kiwanis-scout-camp: Cub Scout resident camp on the St. Croix River in Marine on St. Croix, Minnesota, offering weekend overnight programs with indoor bunk housing, ponies, climbing, and shooting sports.
mn-phillippo-scout-camp: Cub Scout resident summer camp in Cannon Falls, Minnesota, offering a weekend overnight program with an optional Webelos Outpost extra night.
mn-rum-river-scout-camp: A week-long Cub day program on the 167-acre Rum River Scout Camp, set along the banks of the Rum River in Anoka, Minnesota, serving Scouts in kindergarten through sixth grade.
ma-camp-resolute-e-paul-robsham-scout-re: Cub Scout day camp on Little Pond in Bolton, Massachusetts, offering archery, BB, nature study, fishing, swimming, and outdoor camp skills.
mi-adventure-point: STEM, leadership, and outdoor adventure center at the DeVos Family Center for Scouting, operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council, offering a Cub Scout summer day camp open to the public.
mi-camp-hiawatha: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council in Michigan's Upper Peninsula, situated on Bunting Lake.
mi-camp-munhacke: Michigan Crossroads Council Cub Scout resident camp situated on Buin Lake, recognized as the largest attended Cub resident camp in Michigan.
mi-camp-rotary: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council, located in the central Lower Peninsula near Clare.
mi-camp-teetonkah: Cub Scout overnight resident camp operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council near Jackson, Michigan.
mi-cole-canoe-base: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council, situated on the Rifle River near Alger, Michigan.
mi-d-bar-a-scout-ranch: A 1,700-acre Michigan Crossroads Council ranch north of Detroit that hosts scouting events; the council's only site offering the Horsemanship merit badge.
mi-gerber-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Michigan Crossroads Council, set within the Manistee Forest near Twin Lake, Michigan.
mi-great-lakes-sailing-adventure-the-ret: High-adventure sailing expedition aboard the Retriever, a 52-foot ketch based in Mackinaw City, Michigan, cruising the northern Great Lakes to destinations such as Mackinac Island, Beaver Island, and Charlevoix. Participants learn sail trim, helmsmanship, navigation, and marine safety.
mi-rota-kiwan-scout-reservation: 199-acre Cub Scout resident camp on Bass Lake in Kalamazoo, Michigan, offering aquatics, shooting sports, ecology, and Scoutcraft.
mn-cedar-point-scout-camp: Cub Scout resident camp near Fairmont offering NOVA modules, a RAD Zoo, astronomy, ice cream making, and shooting sports.
mn-parker-scout-reservation-cub-scout-su: Cub Scout resident summer camp operated by the Central Minnesota Council at Parker Scout Reservation in Nisswa, Minnesota.
mn-parker-scout-reservation-voyageurs-ca: Scouts BSA resident camp for new Scouts on 276 acres at Parker Scout Reservation, set on North Long Lake near Nisswa, Minnesota.
mn-gamehaven-scout-camp: Overnight Cub Scout camp located five miles southeast of Rochester, Minnesota, offering swimming, shooting, hiking, cooking, and advancement.
ms-warren-a-hood-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on the 1,300-acre Hood Scout Reservation in Copiah County, Mississippi, operated by the Mississippi Riverlands Council.
ms-camp-tiak-l-o-crosby-scout-reservatio: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at the L.O. Crosby Scout Reservation in Wiggins, Mississippi, operated by the Pine Burr Area Council.
mo-camp-arrowhead: Ozark Trails Council resident camp near Marshfield, Missouri, set on roughly 600 wooded acres with lakefront activities, a pool, and shooting sports; the oldest Scout camp west of the Mississippi.
ks-theodore-naish-scout-reservation: Heart of America Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on more than 900 acres above the Kaw River Valley near Kansas City, offering over 40 merit badges plus the Rimrock high-adventure trek.
mo-h-roe-bartle-scout-reservation: Heart of America Council's flagship Scouts BSA resident camp set in the Osage hills near Osceola, spanning three camps and offering more than forty merit badges.
mo-rotary-scout-camp: Long-term resident Scouts BSA camp of the Heart of America Council, serving Scouts with special needs and disabilities, offering a merit-badge advancement program.
mo-camp-geiger: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Pony Express Council near Saint Joseph, Missouri.
mo-camp-geiger-cub-adventure-camp: Overnight Cub Scout resident camp in Saint Joseph, Missouri, welcoming all Cub levels and families, hosted by the Pony Express Council.
mo-camp-geiger-webelos-weekend: Resident weekend program at Camp Geiger for Webelos and Arrow of Light Scouts, offering roughly 40 elective activities.
il-camp-vandeventer: Greater St. Louis Area Council camp in Waterloo, Illinois, hosting Cub Adventure Camp and Cub Scout day camp, with a pool, shooting ranges, fishing, trails, and rappelling.
il-rfsr-cub-scout-adventure-camp: Overnight Cub Scout resident adventure camp at Rhodes France Scout Reservation in Pana, Illinois.
il-rhodes-france-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA summer camp with a dining hall, located in central Illinois and operated by the Greater St. Louis Area Council.
mo-camp-lewallen: Scouts BSA summer camp of the Greater St. Louis Area Council, set in Missouri's Ozark Plateau along the St. Francis River.
mo-cub-scout-advancement-camp-at-camp-ma: Overnight Cub Scout resident camp in High Ridge, Missouri, focused on Wolf and Bear advancement.
mo-grizzly-day-camp: Cub Scout day camp held at Beaumont Scout Reservation in High Ridge, Missouri.
mo-s-f-ranger-program: Week-long backcountry backpacking trek across the S-F Scout Ranch, designed for older participants aged 14 and up.
mo-swift-high-adventure-base: High-adventure base at S-F Scout Ranch serving older Scouts and Venturers, located in Knob Lick, Missouri.
mo-s-f-scout-ranch: Sprawling 5,200-acre Greater St. Louis Area Council ranch on 270-acre Nims Lake near Farmington, Missouri, offering Scouts BSA resident camp in two styles—air-conditioned dining or patrol-method campsite cooking. Features aquatics, Huck's Cove water park, Eagle Range shooting sports, STEM, rock climbing/challenge course, and the APEX older-Scout track.
mt-arcola-scout-camp: Rugged high-adventure and primitive camp in Beaverhead National Forest near the Anaconda-Pintler Wilderness, five miles from the Big Hole River, offering backpacking, fishing, and wilderness survival for experienced units.
mt-camp-melita-island: Montana Council resident camp set on an island in Flathead Lake, offering a water-focused program including whitewater rafting, sailing, water skiing, and snorkeling for experienced Scouts BSA.
mt-grizzly-base: Montana Council high-adventure base camp near Bigfork, situated 40 miles south of Glacier National Park and 5 miles north of Flathead Lake, serving as a launch point for unit-planned Bob Marshall Wilderness and Glacier adventures rather than basic Scout-camp programming.
mt-k-m-scout-ranch: Montana Council Scouts BSA resident camp in the Moccasin Mountains near Lewistown, offering ATV and mountain bike trails, aquatics, STEM and trout study, climbing, and range and target activities.
mt-k-m-scout-ranch-cub-scout-camp: Montana Council Cub Scout resident camp near Hilger, Montana, offering BBs, archery, fishing, swimming, boating, and rank adventures; parent or guardian attendance required.
mt-k-m-scout-ranch-missouri-river-high-a: High-adventure canoe trek along the historic Missouri River in Montana, following the Lewis and Clark return route, paddling 50-plus miles toward the 50-Miler Award.
mt-k-m-scout-ranch-webelos-arrow-of-ligh: Montana Council Webelos and Arrow of Light resident camp at K-M Scout Ranch, offering rank adventures including swimming, boating, and range and target activities, with parent, guardian, or den leadership participation required.
mt-montana-outdoor-high-adventure-base-m: Backcountry high-adventure base on the Boone and Crockett Club's Theodore Roosevelt Memorial Ranch near Dupuyer, Montana, offering one-week crew treks.
ne-camp-cornhusker: Cornhusker Council's 480-acre Scouts BSA resident camp near Du Bois in southeast Nebraska, offering a long-term camping experience with over fifty years of resident camping tradition.
ia-little-sioux-scout-ranch: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Mid-America Council in Little Sioux, Iowa.
nh-camp-bell: Scouts BSA resident camp within Griswold Scout Reservation in Gilmanton Iron Works, New Hampshire, operated by the Daniel Webster Council. Emphasizes the patrol method.
nh-camp-carpenter-fort-friendship-day-ca: Cub Scout day camp in Manchester, New Hampshire, open to Scouts and non-Scouts in grades 1 through 5.
nh-hidden-valley-scout-camp: Traditional Scouts BSA resident camp within Griswold Scout Reservation in Gilmanton Iron Works, New Hampshire, operated by Daniel Webster Council. Offers both dining hall and patrol cooking program styles.
nj-joseph-a-citta-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp set in the New Jersey Pine Barrens near Barnegat.
nj-quail-hill-scout-reservation: Monmouth Council Cub Scout day camp in Manalapan/Englishtown, New Jersey, serving youth ages 6–10, with younger Tigers attending alongside an adult. A Cub residence camp is also offered.
ny-forestburg-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning more than 1,200 acres in the Catskills.
ny-camp-tri-mount: Cub Scout day camp in the northern Catskills, registered through Twin Rivers Council.
ny-camp-woodland: Longhouse Council Cub Scout day camp in Constantia, New York, offering range and target activities, a waterfront, nature study, crafts, and fishing.
ny-camp-gorton: Scouts BSA resident camp on Waneta Lake in New York's Finger Lakes region, offering more than fifty merit badges, including Eagle-required options.
ny-camp-sam-wood: Cub Scout overnight resident adventure camp near Letchworth State Park in Portageville, New York.
ny-camp-scouthaven: Cub Scout and Scouts BSA resident camp in Freedom, New York, offering an overnight adventure camp experience through the Great Falls Council.
ny-camp-merz: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Allegheny Highlands Council, situated on Chautauqua Lake in Mayville, New York.
pa-elk-lick-scout-reserve: Cub Scout resident camp of the Allegheny Highlands Council, located in Smethport, Pennsylvania, offering resident sessions and family camp.
ny-camp-bullowa: Cub Scout summer day camp in Stony Point, Rockland County, New York, operated by the Greater Hudson Valley Council.
ny-curtis-s-read-scout-reservation: A 1,000-acre Scouts BSA resident camp in the Adirondacks operated by Greater Hudson Valley Council, featuring Camp Waubeeka with patrol cooking and Camp Buckskin with a dining hall, offering over 50 merit badges, horsemanship, COPE, and climbing.
ny-curtis-s-read-scout-reservation-summi: High-adventure base at Curtis S. Read Scout Reservation in the Adirondacks, offering treks into the surrounding Adirondack Park and High Peaks.
ny-durland-scout-reservation: Greater Hudson Valley Council reservation in Putnam Valley, New York, hosting Cub Scout Day Camp.
ny-j-warren-cutler-scout-reservation: Cub Scout overnight resident adventure camp operated by Seneca Waterways Council in Naples, New York.
ny-camp-kingsley: Scouts BSA resident camp in Oneida County, set in the foothills of the Adirondacks.
nm-gorham-scout-ranch: Scouts BSA resident ranch set in the Sangre de Cristo Mountains of northern New Mexico, north of Santa Fe.
nm-dowling-aquatic-base: Conquistador Council aquatics specialty camp on the Pecos River in Carlsbad, New Mexico, offering stand-up paddle-boarding, swimming, and canoeing; the only aquatics-dedicated Scout camp in the state.
nm-wehinahpay-mountain-camp: High-mountain resident summer camp for Scouts BSA operated by Conquistador Council, set at 8,500 feet in southern New Mexico.
nc-camp-daniel-boone: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the Daniel Boone Council in Western North Carolina.
nc-lumpkin-adventure-base: High-adventure base spanning 117 acres in the Tessentee Valley bordering the Nantahala National Forest, serving as the Daniel Boone Council's staging point for week-long backpacking treks through the mountains of North Carolina, Tennessee, and Georgia.
nc-belk-scout-camp: Cub Scout day camp in Midland, North Carolina, operated by the Mecklenburg County Council, offering STEM activities, archery, BB shooting, and obstacle courses for younger Scouts.
nc-camp-grimes: Mecklenburg County Council's resident summer camp for Scouts BSA, located in Nebo, North Carolina.
nc-camp-john-j-barnhardt: Scouts BSA resident summer camp located on the Cannon Scout Reservation in New London, North Carolina, operated by the Central North Carolina Council.
nc-camp-bud-schiele: Piedmont Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on the 1,500-acre Piedmont Scout Reservation near Rutherfordton, NC, offering more than 50 merit badges, aquatics, shooting sports, COPE and climbing, and a high-adventure program.
nc-camp-tuscarora: Resident summer camp for Scouts BSA operated by Tuscarora Council, located in Four Oaks, North Carolina.
nc-camp-bowers: Cape Fear Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp situated on Lake Katherine in White Oak, North Carolina.
nc-camp-boddie: Scouts BSA resident summer camp at the East Carolina Scout Reservation, situated on the Pamlico River in Blounts Creek, North Carolina.
nc-pamlico-sea-base: High-adventure camp on the Pamlico River in Blounts Creek, adjacent to Camp Boddie, run by the East Carolina Council. Offers treks including sea kayaking along the Outer Banks and Cape Lookout, a sailing expedition, watersports, and SCUBA certification.
nc-camp-raven-knob: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by Old Hickory Council, set in the Blue Ridge Mountains near Mount Airy, North Carolina.
mn-camp-wilderness: Northern Lights Council's 2,400-acre Scouts BSA resident camp in the Paul Bunyan State Forest near Park Rapids, Minnesota, offering merit badges, COPE and climbing, ATV, shooting sports, aquatics, and white water rafting.
mn-camp-wilderness-butler-wilderness-out: Northern Lights Council Cub Scout adventure camp at the Butler Wilderness Outpost in Park Rapids, Minnesota, offering family and pack overnight sessions with archery, swimming, crafts, fishing, and boating.
nd-big-four-camp: Cub Scout day camp on the Big Four Camp property in Minot, North Dakota, offering BB guns, archery, slingshots, and games, with a parent or adult required to attend alongside each Cub Scout.
nd-heart-butte-scout-reservation: Family-style Cub Scout adventure camp on the Lake Tschida reservoir in southwest North Dakota, offering archery, BB guns, crafts, fishing, games, and a campfire show, with tent camping and hot meals served in the dining hall.
oh-camp-stambaugh: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Great Trail Council in the Youngstown/Mahoning area.
oh-seven-ranges-scout-reservation: Buckeye Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning roughly 900 acres in Carroll County, Ohio.
ky-camp-michaels: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Dan Beard Council near Union, Kentucky, offering hiking, range sports, games, crafts, cooking, STEM activities, and conservation projects for youth in the outdoors.
oh-cub-world: Cub Scout resident adventure camp at the Dan Beard Scout Reservation, adjacent to Camp Craig and Camp Friedlander.
oh-camp-hugh-taylor-birch: Tecumseh Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Yellow Springs, Ohio, also serving Cub Scout day and resident programs.
oh-firelands-scout-reservation: Lake Erie Council's home base for Cub Scout and Webelos resident camps, hosting overnight adventure sessions at Camp Wyandot in Wakeman, Ohio.
oh-camp-falling-rock: Simon Kenton Council Scouts BSA resident camp on more than 600 acres, located about 11 miles north of Newark, Ohio.
oh-camp-lazarus: Simon Kenton Council Cub Scout day camp site located north of Columbus in Delaware, Ohio, hosting district day camps and a STEM day camp.
oh-camp-oyo: Simon Kenton Council Cub Scout day camp set within Shawnee State Forest in Scioto County, Ohio.
oh-cricket-holler-scout-camp: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Miami Valley Council in Dayton, Ohio.
oh-camp-berry: Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Findlay, Ohio, operated by the Black Swamp Area Council as one of its two Scouts BSA camps alongside Camp Lakota.
oh-camp-lakota: Black Swamp Area Council's 640-acre Scouts BSA resident summer camp situated on Lake Glengary in Defiance, Ohio.
mi-camp-frank-s-betz: Cub Scout family resident camp on a 57-acre preserve along Lake Chapin in Berrien Springs, Michigan, offering range and target activities, waterfront, boating, and handicrafts.
oh-camp-frontier: Erie Shores Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp located at Pioneer Scout Reservation.
oh-camp-miakonda: Erie Shores Council Cub Scout day camp located in Toledo, Ohio.
oh-muskingum-valley-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA and Cub Scout resident summer camp in Coshocton, Ohio, operated by the Muskingum Valley Council.
ok-camp-simpson: Arbuckle Area Council's fully accredited 2,000-acre Scouts BSA resident camp near Tishomingo, Oklahoma.
ok-camp-george-thomas: Cub and Webelos resident camp operated by the Last Frontier Council in Apache, Oklahoma.
ok-kerr-scout-ranch-at-slippery-falls: Last Frontier Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Tishomingo, Oklahoma.
ok-arrow-of-light-trail-to-troop-residen: Arrow of Light resident camp for rising fifth graders at Hale Scout Reservation, offered by Indian Nations Council in Talihina, Oklahoma.
ok-babbitt-cub-world-at-zink-scout-ranch: Family and Cub Scout program area at Zink Scout Ranch near Skiatook, Oklahoma, operated by the Indian Nations Council.
ok-camp-robson-jack-graves-outdoor-educa: A 180-acre Indian Nations Council property in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma, hosting Cub Scout and Webelos day camp and home to the Outer Limits COPE and high-elements course.
ok-hale-scout-reservation: Indian Nations Council's 620-acre Scouts BSA resident camp set in the Winding Stair Mountains within the Ouachita National Forest.
ok-mabee-scout-reservation: A 600-acre Indian Nations Council reservation near Locust Grove, Oklahoma, hosting Cub Scout resident camp, Webelos Woods, high adventure, and shooting sports.
ok-zbase-jack-zink-high-adventure-base: High-adventure base of the Indian Nations Council spanning 35,000 acres across Zink Ranch and Skiatook Lake near Skiatook, Oklahoma, offering seven-day treks.
or-butte-creek-scout-ranch: Cub Scout resident camp on a Wild West horse ranch, serving Tiger, Wolf, and Bear Scouts, including the Rover individual-Scout program.
or-camp-baldwin: Wooded resident camp in the Cascade foothills featuring a lake waterfront, dining hall, shooting sports, climbing, and COPE, with STEM offerings, a first-year Scout program, and an older Scout program.
or-camp-clark-adventure-cove: Coastal high-adventure program on the 780-acre Meriwether/Clark Scout Reservation at Cape Lookout, south of Tillamook, offering sea kayaking, rock climbing, sandboarding, shooting sports, and clamming and crabbing.
or-camp-meriwether: Oceanfront resident camp on the Oregon coast featuring a waterfront with sailing, surfing, and scuba, plus shooting sports, climbing, COPE, and a dining hall. Offers a dedicated older-Scout program with high-adventure options.
or-camp-pioneer: Cascade Pacific Council mountain resident camp at 4,500 feet near Mount Jefferson, offering non-traditional Scouts BSA programs including TTFC+ (Tenderfoot–First Class), Eagle Camp, and Throne Quest.
or-camp-pioneer-cascade-trek: High-adventure backpacking treks through the high-altitude backcountry of the Oregon Cascades, based at Camp Pioneer.
pa-camp-acahela: Cub Scout resident camp on 250 acres of Pocono woodlands near Blakeslee, Pennsylvania, sited at the confluence of the Lehigh River and Tobyhanna Creek. Operated by the Northeastern Pennsylvania Council, with accommodations in two-person canvas tents.
pa-goose-pond-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on 507 acres surrounding a 43-acre glacial lake in northeastern Pennsylvania, near Lake Wallenpaupack; offers aquatics including whitewater, shooting sports, ATV, climbing and COPE, and over 70 merit badges.
pa-camp-mountain-run: Bucktail Council's 380-acre Scouts BSA resident camp in Penfield, Pennsylvania.
pa-camp-buck-run: Cub Scout resident camp of the Westmoreland-Fayette Council, located at Eberly Scout Reservation in Somerset, Pennsylvania.
pa-camp-conestoga: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Westmoreland-Fayette Council at Eberly Scout Reservation in Somerset, Pennsylvania.
pa-bashore-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning over 400 acres in Pennsylvania's Blue Mountains, operated by the Pennsylvania Dutch Council.
pa-j-edward-mack-scout-reservation: Cub Scout resident camp operated by the Pennsylvania Dutch Council at Camp Mack in Newmanstown, Pennsylvania, offering weekend and week-long sessions.
pa-camp-garrison: Cub World day camp at Musser Scout Reservation in Pennsburg, Pennsylvania, run by the Cradle of Liberty Council, offering archery, BB, handicraft, and STEM activities.
pa-camp-hart: Cub Scout summer resident program for Cub Scouts and Webelos, set on the 1,400-acre Musser Scout Reservation along Unami Creek in Pennsburg, Pennsylvania, operated by the Cradle of Liberty Council.
md-camp-potomac-river-base: A 114-acre Laurel Highlands Council high-adventure base along the Potomac River near the C&O Canal, offering self-scheduled canoe float trips in Maryland and West Virginia.
md-camp-potomac-scouts-at-work-camp: Laurel Highlands Council's 114-acre resident camp in Oldtown, MD, hosting the "Scouts at Work" program focused on trades and STEM careers including aviation, welding, robotics, railroading, and archaeology, alongside traditional camp elements.
pa-camp-freedom: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by Laurel Highlands Council at Heritage Reservation in Farmington, Pennsylvania, featuring a dining hall.
pa-camp-guyasuta: Cub Scout day camp operated by the Laurel Highlands Council in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, offering daytime programming without overnight stays.
pa-camp-liberty: Laurel Highlands Council's Scouts BSA resident camp at Heritage Reservation, set on a peninsula in Lake Courage. One of the few remaining full patrol-cooking camps, offering 50+ merit badges, a First Year Camper program, and a Day Trek high-adventure option for ages 14 and up.
pa-eagle-base-heritage-reservation: High-adventure Day Trek program at Heritage Reservation, offering older Scouts BSA off-site adventure beyond merit badges.
pa-hawk-mountain-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident camp near New Ringgold, Pennsylvania, in Schuylkill County, offering a first-year camper program, aquatics with pool and lakefront, range and target activities, outdoor skills, conservation, handicraft, climbing, and zip-lining.
pa-custaloga-town-scout-reservation: French Creek Council's resident summer camp in Carlton, Pennsylvania, serving Scouts BSA and Cub Scouts.
md-camp-horseshoe: Chester County Council's Scouts BSA resident camp at Horseshoe Scout Reservation, located in Rising Sun, Maryland.
pa-camp-john-h-ware-iii: Chester County Council Cub Scout overnight resident camp located at Horseshoe Scout Reservation in Peach Bottom, Pennsylvania.
pa-camp-conewago: Cub Scout overnight resident camp in New Oxford, Pennsylvania, operated by the New Birth of Freedom Council.
pa-camp-tuckahoe: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by the New Birth of Freedom Council, located in Dillsburg, Pennsylvania.
ma-camp-norse: Narragansett Council's Cub Scout day camp for youth in grades 1–5, offering archery, BB, boating, swimming, crafts, outdoor cooking, and STEM activities.
ri-adventure-day-camp-at-champlin-advent: Cub Scout day camp for youth in grades 1-5 at Champlin Scout Reservation in Cranston, Rhode Island, offering archery, BB, boating, swimming, crafts, outdoor cooking, and STEM activities.
sc-camp-ho-non-wah: Coastal Carolina Council's resident camp spanning 184 acres along the Bohicket River on Wadmalaw Island, offering more than 70 merit badges and a Woodsman program for new scouts.
sc-camp-barstow: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning more than 300 acres along Lake Murray in Saluda County, open to male and female troops.
sc-camp-coker: Cub Scout resident summer camp near Society Hill, South Carolina, operated by Indian Waters Council, offering overnight camping and meals.
tn-skymont-scout-reservation: Cherokee Area Council's Scouts BSA summer camp spanning over 2,200 acres of the Cumberland Plateau, offering 50 merit badges, first-year programs, and off-site high-adventure and hiking options.
tn-camp-buck-toms: Great Smoky Mountain Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on a cove of Watts Bar Lake, offering a Dan Beard first-year program, high adventure, and a wide range of merit badges.
tn-camp-pellissippi: Great Smoky Mountain Council camp on Norris Lake, serving as home base for the Winding Waters Adventures high-adventure program, offering mountain biking, backpacking, rock climbing, whitewater rafting, canoeing, and kayaking for older Scouts, Venturers, and Sea Scouts.
ar-kia-kima-scout-reservation: Chickasaw Council resident camp spanning roughly 540 acres in the Arkansas Ozarks along the South Fork River. Offerings include scoutcraft, aquatics, shooting sports, climbing/COPE, the Trailblazers first-year program, and Ozark Venture high adventure, with dining hall and troop cooking options.
ms-camp-currier: Chickasaw Council camp in Eudora/Hernando, Mississippi, hosting the council's Cub day camp and district events.
tn-camp-mack-morris: Scouts BSA resident summer camp on roughly 500 acres along the Tennessee River at Birdsong Creek, offering shooting sports, COPE and climbing, aquatics, merit badges, and a First Year Camper program.
tn-boxwell-reservation: Middle Tennessee Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Lebanon, Tennessee, encompassing Camps Craig and Stahlman, offering more than sixty merit badges alongside adventure activities.
tn-grimes-canoe-base: High-adventure canoe and kayak base operated by the Middle Tennessee Council on the Buffalo River, offering guided river trips for Troops and Crews.
tx-camp-billy-gibbons: Texas Trails Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Brady Creek, south of Richland Springs, offering aquatics, scoutcraft, nature, shooting sports, climbing and rappelling, and handicraft.
tx-camp-tonkawa: Cub Scout resident camp operated by the Texas Trails Council near Tuscola, Texas.
tx-camp-don-harrington: Golden Spread Council's Cub Scout day camp spanning over 1,600 acres in Palo Duro Canyon south of Amarillo, Texas, where the council also offers Scouts BSA programming.
tx-camp-m-k-brown: Golden Spread Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp located in the Texas Panhandle, near the Oklahoma border.
tx-lost-pines-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp operated by Capitol Area Council, situated on the north shore of Lake Bastrop in the Lost Pines region of Bastrop, Texas.
tx-buffalo-trail-scout-ranch: A 9,000-acre council resident camp set in the Davis Mountains of West Texas.
tx-camp-constantin-jack-d-furst-aquatic-: Circle Ten Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Possum Kingdom Lake, including the Jack D. Furst Aquatic Base.
tx-camp-james-ray: Circle Ten Council resident weekend camp near Lake Texoma, offering summer Cub Adventure programming for Cub Scouts.
tx-camp-wisdom: Cub Scout day camp operated by Circle Ten Council in southwest Dallas.
tx-clements-scout-ranch-trevor-rees-jone: Circle Ten Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp at Clements Scout Ranch, encompassing Trevor Rees-Jones Scout Camp and Camp Meisenbach, located near Athens, Texas.
tx-bovay-scout-ranch: Sam Houston Area Council's Cub Scout resident and family campout at Bovay Scout Ranch, which includes Tellepsen Scout Camp, near Navasota, Texas.
tx-camp-strake: Sam Houston Area Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Coldspring, Texas.
tx-camp-karankawa: Scouts BSA resident camp spanning 130 acres along Lake Corpus Christi near Mathis, Texas, operated by the South Texas Council, featuring an air-conditioned dining hall.
tx-scott-scout-ranch: Three Rivers Council's roughly 715-acre scout ranch set in the East Texas Piney Woods near Woodville, north of Beaumont. Open year-round for camping and host to council-run resident summer and winter camps.
tx-bear-creek-scout-camp: Alamo Area Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Hunt, Texas, offering Bear Claw, Ranger first-year, and traditional program tracks.
ar-camp-preston-hunt: Caddo Area Council's 250-acre year-round camp on the outskirts of Texarkana, Arkansas, offering a Cub Scout and Webelos resident program with a swimming pool, dining hall, canoe lake, cub pirate ship, and COPE course.
tx-george-w-pirtle-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp of the East Texas Area Council near Gary, Texas, offering a first-year First Class Trail program and an aquatics program.
tx-camp-perkins-perkins-scout-reservatio: Northwest Texas Council's Scouts BSA resident camp in Wichita Falls, offering year-round camping and programming.
id-camp-bartlett: Crossroads of the West Council's resident camp in Idaho's Bear Lake Valley near Montpelier, featuring 50+ campsites around a stocked lake, with swimming, paddling, range sports, climbing, and slacklining.
ut-camp-fife: Cub Scout and Webelos day camp operated by Crossroads of the West Council in Box Elder County near Collinston, Utah.
ut-camp-hunt: Crossroads of the West Council Scouts BSA resident camp on the west shore of Bear Lake in Rich County, north of Garden City. Aquatics-focused offerings include swimming, paddleboarding, kayaking, canoeing, rowing, and sailing, along with merit badges and advancement.
ut-camp-kiesel: Cub Scout and Webelos day camp in Weber County near Huntsville, Utah, operated by the Crossroads of the West Council.
ut-camp-maple-dell: Cub Scout and primary youth day camp in Payson Canyon above Mapleton, Utah County, offering archery and target sports, nature exploration, and outdoor games.
ut-camp-maple-dell-webelos-and-arrow-of-: Overnight Webelos and Arrow of Light family adventure in Payson Canyon, Utah County, preparing older Cub Scouts for the transition to Scouts BSA.
ut-camp-tifie: Crossroads of the West Council Scouts BSA resident camp in Sanpete County near Mount Pleasant, Utah, offering swimming, target and range sports, a challenge and ropes course, and merit badge programs.
ut-camp-tracy: Cub Scout and Webelos day camp in Millcreek Canyon, Salt Lake County, Utah, offering a nature trail, BB guns, archery, and rowboats.
ut-hinckley-scout-ranch: Resident Scouts BSA camp in the High Uintas Wilderness area of Summit County, Utah, operated by the Crossroads of the West Council. Features the Thomas S. Monson Lodge and multiple base camps—North Slope, Trail Head, Frontier, Tomahawk, Pinnacle, Riverview, and Ridgeline—serving weeklong youth-group camping.
wy-camp-loll: Wilderness Scouts BSA resident camp of the Crossroads of the West Council, set on Lake of the Woods in Teton County, Wyoming, near Yellowstone. Offers a classic camp program alongside high-adventure options and the A.C.E. program for older youth.
wy-camp-loll-backcountry-treks-teton-cre: Backcountry high-adventure treks for older youth based out of Camp Loll, including the Teton Crest Trek through Grand Teton National Park and the Tetons to Cascades Trek across the Jedediah Smith Wilderness and Yellowstone's Union Falls.
wy-teton-high-adventure-base: Nationally accredited high-adventure base south of Jackson Hole in Wyoming, offering whitewater rafting, kayaking, mountain biking, backpacking, and a rope course, with bunkhouse and tent lodging and a dining hall.
pa-camp-sinoquipe-scout-reservation: Shenandoah Area Council's 530-acre Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Fulton County, Pennsylvania, featuring a 10-acre lake, more than 40 merit badges, and dedicated first-year (Lakusin) and second-year (Trailblazer) programs.
va-camp-rock-enon: Shenandoah Area Council Cub Scout and Webelos resident summer camp offering rank Adventures, aquatics, climbing, and range and target sports.
va-camp-ottari: Scouts BSA resident camp at Blue Ridge Scout Reservation in the Blue Ridge Mountains, offering traditional tent campsites, more than 30 merit badges, and the Mile Swim.
va-camp-powhatan: Scouts BSA resident camp at Blue Ridge Scout Reservation in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Hiwassee, Virginia, operated by Blue Ridge Mountains Council.
va-claytor-lake-aquatics-base: High-adventure aquatics base on Claytor Lake in Virginia, operated by the Blue Ridge Mountains Council as part of the Blue Ridge Scout Reservation.
va-camp-t-brady-saunders: Heart of Virginia Council's Scouts BSA long-term resident summer camp in Maidens, Virginia.
va-cub-and-webelos-adventure-camp: Cub Scout resident camp operated by the Heart of Virginia Council at the Heart of Virginia Scout Reservation in Maidens, Virginia.
wa-fire-mountain-scout-camp: Resident camp in the North Cascades foothills near Mount Vernon, Washington, featuring a strong first-year program and mountain biking trails, plus a dining hall, waterfront, shooting sports, climbing, COPE, and STEM offerings.
wa-camp-black-mountain: Property retained for weekend and off-season use; no resident summer camp is offered.
wa-camp-bonaparte: Cub Scout and Scouts BSA resident camp on Bonaparte Lake in Washington's Colville National Forest, offering archery, BB guns, swimming, boating, and a climbing wall.
wa-camp-edward: Cub Scout resident camp offering the Buckaroo Round-Up program for Wolf, Bear, and Webelos Scouts, operated by the Chief Seattle Council near Snohomish, Washington.
wa-camp-parsons: Historic Hood Canal resident camp at the foot of the Olympic Mountains, offering sailing, kayaking, and mountain treks. Facilities include a waterfront, dining hall, shooting sports, and climbing, plus an older Scout program and high-adventure options.
wa-camp-pigott: Chief Seattle Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp located near Monroe and Snohomish, Washington.
wa-camp-sheppard: Cascade forest resident camp bordering Mt. Rainier National Forest, offering hiking and ecology programs alongside a dining hall, shooting sports, climbing, COPE, and STEM activities.
wa-scout-a-vista: Alpine Cub Scout day camp operated by Chief Seattle Council (Grand Columbia) near Wenatchee, Washington, located northeast of Mission Ridge Ski Resort.
ak-alaska-ultimate-high-adventure: Council-operated high-adventure trek program in Trapper Creek, Alaska, based out of the Denali High Adventure Scout Base.
ak-camp-gorsuch: Great Alaska Council's traditional Scouts BSA resident summer camp set on Mirror Lake at the Rasmuson Scout Reservation, offering merit badges along with Project C.O.P.E. and a climbing tower.
ak-chilkoot-high-adventure-base: Great Alaska Council high-adventure base on the Chilkat Peninsula near Haines, offering custom multi-day backpacking, sea kayaking, mountaineering, and whitewater rafting expeditions for Scouts BSA.
ak-denali-high-adventure-scout-base: Great Alaska Council's 2,000-acre property near mile 133 on the Parks Highway, offering week-long resident Scouts BSA summer camp for in-council and visiting units.
ak-lost-lake-scout-camp: Scouts BSA resident camp and Northern Lights High Adventure Base spanning more than 600 acres south of Fairbanks, Alaska.
id-camp-easton: Inland Northwest Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp on the shore of Lake Coeur d'Alene, offering a broad merit-badge program that includes SCUBA.
id-camp-grizzly: Historic Scouts BSA resident summer camp on the Palouse River in the Hoodoo Mountains, run by the Inland Northwest Council, featuring six shooting-sports ranges and the Eagle's Nest new-Scout program.
id-north-idaho-high-adventure-base: Council high-adventure base at Camp Easton on Lake Coeur d'Alene, offering peak climbing, whitewater rafting, mountain biking, and backcountry treks, with a distinct trek program.
wa-cowles-scout-reservation-cub-scout-ov: Inland Northwest Council Cub Scout overnight and resident camp on Diamond Lake in Newport, Washington.
wa-camp-thunderbird: Cub Scout resident summer camp of Pacific Harbors Council, set on Summit Lake west of Olympia, Washington, serving Cub Scouts in early elementary grades.
oh-fort-steuben-scout-reservation: Mountaineer Area Council property in eastern Ohio offering a short-term Scouts BSA resident camp experience focused on rank advancement and merit badges.
wv-camp-mountaineer: Mountaineer Area Council's Scouts BSA resident camp spanning over 1,000 acres near Morgantown, West Virginia, offering a block program schedule with 50 merit badges.
wv-sandscrest-scout-reservation-cub-scou: Mountaineer Area Council Cub Scout day camp associated with Sandscrest Scout Reservation in Wheeling, West Virginia, serving youth entering grades one through five.
wv-camp-arrowhead-general-andrew-lewis-s: Buckskin Council's 280-acre summer camp in Ona, West Virginia, serving as the council's consolidated site for Scouts BSA and Cub Scout camping.
wi-ed-bryant-scout-reservation: Glacier's Edge Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 244 acres along Castle Rock Lake near Mauston, Wisconsin, offering boating, jet skiing, ATVs, and a range of merit badges.
wi-ed-bryant-scout-reservation-cub-scout: Cub Scout resident camp at Ed Bryant Scout Reservation in Mauston, Wisconsin, serving Glacier's Edge Council Scouts from Lion through Arrow of Light with overnight camping.
wi-camp-decorah: Council-operated Scouts BSA resident summer camp in Holmen, Wisconsin, offering a multi-night stay.
wi-akelas-world-cub-scout-camp: Cub Scout weekend resident camp at Crystal Lake Scout Reservation near Rhinelander, Wisconsin, operated by Samoset Council for Cub Scout packs with high-energy activities.
wi-hanna-venture-base: High-adventure base within Samoset Council's Crystal Lake Scout Reservation in Rhinelander, Wisconsin, offering week-long wilderness treks to the Apostle Islands and Porcupine Mountains for older Scouts and Venturers, with gear provided.
wi-tesomas-scout-camp: Samoset Council's flagship Scouts BSA resident camp at Crystal Lake Scout Reservation near Rhinelander, Wisconsin, offering week-long periods with a wide range of merit badge opportunities.
wi-camp-rokilio: Cub Scout resident camp on 213 acres in the Kettle Moraine near Kiel, with lodging in four themed buildings. Offers waterfront, shooting sports, nature, and STEM/NOVA programming for Tigers through Webelos.
wi-gardner-dam-adventure-base: Bay-Lakes Council Scouts BSA and Venturing adventure resident camp on 400 acres along the Wild Wolf River in Langlade County, Wisconsin, featuring whitewater kayaking and rafting, COPE and climbing, ATVing, mountain biking, and merit badges.
wi-gardner-dam-adventure-base-webelos-ao: Bay-Lakes Council Webelos/Arrow of Light adventure summer camp in White Lake, Wisconsin, designed as a preparatory program for Scouts BSA.
wi-camp-oh-da-ko-ta: Cub Scout day camp on 185 acres with waterfront on Dyer Lake near Burlington, offering boating, swimming, fishing, field sports, nature, and shooting sports. Serves as a certified Cub Scout day camp and family camping facility.
wi-camp-oh-da-ko-ta-first-year-camper-pr: Overnight First Year Camper program in Burlington, Wisconsin, from Three Harbors Council for new Scouts BSA, helping participants work toward Tenderfoot, Second Class, and First Class requirements along with up to two merit badges.
nj-alpine-day-camp: Cub Scout day camp at Alpine Scout Camp along Palisades Park, spanning 500 acres with indoor and outdoor climbing and an Olympic-sized pool, operated by Greater New York Councils.
nj-john-e-reeves-cub-world-at-alpine-sco: Cub Scout resident camp on 500 wooded acres along the Palisades, operated by Greater New York Councils; campers stay in two-person wall tents on platforms.
ny-camp-ranachqua-ten-mile-river-scout-c: Rustic Scouts BSA resident summer camp on Lake Nianque within the Ten Mile River Scout Camps reservation of the Greater New York Councils, in Narrowsburg, New York.
ny-william-h-pouch-scout-camp: Greater New York Councils camp on Staten Island, the only Scout camp within New York City, offering a day camp along with weekend and merit badge programs.
mo-camp-hohn: Great Rivers Council patrol-method Scouts BSA resident camp on the Osage Arm of Lake of the Ozarks, offering 80+ merit badges, STEM programs at the Sinquefield Invention Campus, aquatics, shooting sports, COPE/climbing, and a Brownsea first-year program.
il-camp-lowden: Blackhawk Area Council camp along the Rock River near Oregon, Illinois, hosting a Cub Scout day camp with BB shooting, archery, catapults, a nature hike, and crafts.
il-canyon-camp: Blackhawk Area Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Galena and Stockton, Illinois, offering over 55 merit badges alongside specialty programs.
pr-guajataka-scout-reservation-camp-guaj: Puerto Rico Council's traditional summer camp on Guajataca Lake in San Sebastian, serving Scouts BSA with merit badges and rank advancement (Tenderfoot, Second Class, First Class), along with Cub Scouts and Venturing.
tx-camp-tahuaya: Longhorn Council's roughly 150-acre family adventure campground in Belton, Texas, hosting Cub Quest advancement day events for Cub Scouts.
tx-chisholm-trail-adventure-base: Longhorn Council's flagship high-adventure program at Sid Richardson Scout Ranch on 10,000-acre Lake Bridgeport, using pontoon boats to reach watersports bases and outposts along 15 miles of shoreline.
tx-sid-richardson-scout-ranch-sr2: Longhorn Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 2,500 acres with 15 miles of shoreline along Lake Bridgeport near Runaway Bay, Texas, featuring a "Great American West" theme.
tx-worth-ranch: Longhorn Council's traditional Scouts BSA resident summer camp near Fort Worth on the Brazos River, offering climbing gardens, river aquatics, two pools, hiking on Kyle Mountain, and an ATV program.
fl-wallwood-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning over 600 acres along Lake Talquin in Gadsden County, near Quincy, Florida.
nj-pine-hill-scout-reservation: Wooded Garden State Council camping facility in Camden County, New Jersey, east of Philadelphia, offering shooting sports, canoeing, fishing, hiking trails, and a large field pavilion.
nj-pine-tree-education-and-environmental: Garden State Council Cub Scout day camp in the Pinelands National Reserve at Tabernacle, New Jersey, offering canoeing, BB gun and archery, orienteering, and trail biking, with six heated cabins and a conference center.
nj-roosevelt-scout-reservation: Garden State Council Cub Scout day camp located in Elmer, New Jersey.
nm-camp-tres-ritos: High-altitude Scouts BSA resident summer camp in New Mexico's Sangre de Cristo Mountains, operated by the South Plains Council, featuring patrol-style cooking and a merit-badge program, with units bringing their own tents and cooking gear.
tx-c-w-post-memorial-scout-camp: South Plains Council Scouts BSA camp in Garza County near Post, Texas, offering horseback riding, mountain biking, climbing, and shooting sports, along with a 135,000-gallon pool.
sd-lewis-and-clark-scout-reservation: Scouts BSA summer camp situated on Lewis & Clark Lake west of Yankton, operated by the Sioux Council.
sd-lewis-and-clark-scout-reservation-cub: Cub resident family weekend program at Lewis & Clark Scout Reservation in Tabor, South Dakota.
sd-missouri-river-high-adventure-base: High-adventure base offering a 60-mile canoe trek along the Missouri River, operated by Sioux Council in South Dakota.
ak-northern-lights-high-adventure-base: Midnight Sun Council's remote wilderness high-adventure base offering guided Alaska treks staged from Fairbanks, with custom trek durations.
or-camp-baker: Coastal dunes resident camp featuring an aquatics-heavy program with sailing, waterfront, and pool, plus shooting sports, climbing, mountain biking, and a dining hall.
or-camp-mcloughlin: Pacific Crest Council Cub Scout resident summer camp on Lake of the Woods near Klamath Falls, Oregon.
or-camp-mcloughlin-webelos-aol-camp: Pacific Crest Council Webelos/Arrow of Light resident camp near Klamath Falls, Oregon.
or-camp-melakwa: High-Cascades resident camp set at elevation, offering mountain hiking, COPE, and climbing, plus a waterfront, dining hall, and programming for older Scouts including high-adventure options.
tn-camp-davy-crockett: Sequoyah Council's Scouts BSA resident summer camp spanning 1,865 acres in the foothills of the Great Smoky Mountains along Cherokee Lake, offering 50+ merit badges, Frontier Camp living history, COPE and climbing, aquatics, and horsemanship.
ms-camp-yocona: Council Scouts BSA resident summer camp located near Tupelo, in Randolph, Mississippi.
fl-spanish-trail-scout-reservation: Gulf Coast Council's premier Scout camp of Northwest Florida (Camp Euchee) in DeFuniak Springs, spanning over 1,200 acres and offering Scouts BSA and Cub resident camping with merit badges, aquatics, and shooting sports.
fl-spanish-trail-scout-reservation-cub-s: Cub Scout resident camp at Camp Euchee within Spanish Trail Scout Reservation, operated by the Gulf Coast Council in northwest Florida.
tx-camp-perry-scout-reservation: Rio Grande Council's Scouts BSA summer camp spanning 260 acres along the Arroyo Colorado near Harlingen, Texas.
pa-ockanickon-scout-reservation: A 240-acre council Scouts BSA resident summer camp located in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.
ae-camp-avantura-bsa: Transatlantic Council seaside Scouts BSA resident camp in Savudrija, offering the ACE first-year program, merit badges in aquatics, outdoor skills, handicrafts, and science, plus IOLS adult training.
ae-camp-alpine: Transatlantic Council nationally-accredited Scouts BSA resident camp at Kandersteg International Scout Centre in the Swiss Alps, offering Base Camp, Ascent merit badge, and Summit high-adventure tracks.
ae-camp-freedom: Council-owned Cub Scout resident camp near Marktbergel/Oberdachstetten, Germany, operated by the Transatlantic Council. Also hosts Order of the Arrow weekends and family camping.
ap-camp-dragon: Far East Council Scouts BSA resident camp located at White Beach, Okinawa, Japan.
ap-camp-okami: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by the Far East Council at the Tama Hills Recreation Center, a US military recreation area near Tokyo, Japan.
ap-asia-trilogy-camp-malaysia: Far East Council Scouts BSA resident camp located in Malaysia.
ap-christmas-camp: Far East Council Scouts BSA resident camp located in Angeles City, Philippines.
fl-florida-sea-base: Scouting America's national ocean high-adventure base in the Florida Keys, offering sailing, scuba, and fishing treks.
nm-philmont-scout-ranch: High-adventure base offering backcountry backpacking treks through the mountains of northern New Mexico; Scouting America's flagship destination.
wv-james-c-justice-national-scout-camp: Scouts BSA and Venturing resident camp at the Summit Bechtel Reserve in West Virginia, offering more than 70 merit badges, the Brownsea first-year program, and access to high-adventure venues including whitewater, ziplining, BMX, and mountain biking.
